transcript.text: Hello, let's keep up with the V-LOG of V-Livin' in a Van, a refugee-style V-LOG, the 9th of December,
Yesterday, I got up, and then I made my videos, um, two videos, I talked for an hour and 17
Minutes on one, and then, um, yeah, um, 30 on another, History of Italy and History of
Spain, and then we just smoked weed and drank beer and hung out on the internet and watched
Family Guy and, um, American Dad, that was cool, and then I watched, um, um, um, uh, The
Tudors, two episodes at night, okay, that was yesterday.
